---
title: "PCIG Mixer at the 2026 FCSM Conference"
---

As part of [the 2026 Federal Committee on Statistical Methodology (FCSM) Conference](https://fcsmconf.org/), the PCIG is hosting a mixer at Kirwan's on the Wharf for March 12 starting at 5:30. This will be a great opportunity to learn about the PCIG, meet other members of the community, and enjoy some food and drink in a fun local venue. We hope to see you there!

#### Details:
We have booked a room located upstairs and will provide some appetizers but people will need to buy their own drinks. The room can hold about 25 people, and any overflow can mingle at the upstairs bar.

| **[Kirwan's on the Wharf](https://www.kirwansonthewharf.com/)**
[749 Wharf St SW, Washington, DC 20024](https://maps.app.goo.gl/KPfoCKYRq2EshdhX8)

People can take the Metro from Suitland to very close to Kirwan's.  There is also parking at the Wharf or on any of the nearby streets.

| Directions from Waterfront Metro Station (Green Line):
* Leave from 4th St SW - about 0.1 mi, less than 1 min
* Turn right onto M St SW - 0.1 mi, about 2 min
* Bear right at Maine Ave SW - 0.2 mi, about 4 min
* Turn left onto 7th St SW - about 0.1 mi, less than 1 min
* Turn right onto 7th St SW - about 0.1 mi, less than 1 min
* Turn right onto Water St SW - about 0.1 mi, less than 1 min
* You have arrived at Water St SW. Your destination is on the left
* Proceed upstairs to the reserved room

![](/assets/FCSM26mixer.png "Map of directions to Kirwan's on the Wharf from the Waterfront Metro Station")
